---
title: "Vikrant Patil"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/vikipedia
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vikrantpatil/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:vikrant.patil@gmail.com"
---


I have over 22 years of experience in software development
across a range of computational fields — from Computational Fluid Dynamics
and bioinformatics algorithms to network-based license servers and Python
programming. I have received a M.Tech in Computational Science from the Indian Institute of
Science, Bangalore and B.E (Mechanical Engineering) from College of Engineering, Pune.

I've worked at [**Strand Life Sciences**](https://strandls.com/), **DRDO**, and **Mahindra**, and
consulted for [**Prayas Energy Group**](https://energy.prayaspune.org/about-us) and [**S&I Engineering Solutions**](https://sandi.co.in/).
I'm a lead contributor to [Rumi](https://github.com/prayas-energy/rumi),
an open-source energy modelling platform by Prayas.

I also run corporate Python programming trainings through
[Pipal Academy](https://pipal.in/), and have delivered workshops at
organisations including DRDO, Arcesium, VMware, and Blinkit. The full
archive is on the [Trainings page](trainings.qmd).

My main interests are mathematics, mathematical algorithms, open-source tooling and Linux, high-performance computing, and writing good programs.
